raw_response:
I agree with the provided explanation but want to add another point regarding the consistency of stool characteristics observed clinically. Breastfed infants generally do not produce gold-colored stools; instead, they tend to have darker, greener stools early on before transitioning to a lighter brown color over time. This further supports Option C as the outlier since other symptoms listed align well with what we observe in exclusively breastfed infants.

Therefore, my clear answer remains: **C: Golden colour stool**.
